message:
fix: install libicu-dev on Ubuntu CI for go-icu-regex build (dolt-test-z5l6)

The go-icu-regex vendored library requires ICU4C headers (unicode/regex.h)
to compile on Linux. The CI was only installing ICU4C on macOS via Homebrew
but not on Ubuntu, causing build failures in both the test and lint jobs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/topaz
Rig: beads
Role: polecats

files.patch:
@@ -68,6 +68,12 @@ jobs:
         with:
           go-version-file: 'go.mod'
 
+      - name: Install ICU4C (Linux)
+        if: matrix.os == 'ubuntu-latest'
+        run: |
+          sudo apt-get update
+          sudo apt-get install -y libicu-dev
+
       - name: Install ICU4C (macOS)
         if: matrix.os == 'macos-latest'
         run: |
@@ -179,6 +185,11 @@ jobs:
         with:
           go-version-file: 'go.mod'
 
+      - name: Install ICU4C (Linux)
+        run: |
+          sudo apt-get update
+          sudo apt-get install -y libicu-dev
+
       - name: golangci-lint
         uses: golangci/golangci-lint-action@v9
         with:
